fingerprint: quality:`echos inbox` is implicitly assumed to decrypt blobs, but that behavior is not surfaced as an assumption or command contract.
reason: Design decision pinned: echos inbox lists each pending item and, per item, downloads it (GET /blob) and decrypts it client-side to display the verified sender, project_hint, and title — the same decrypt path as open minus the install step. The relay only ever returns ciphertext plus envelope metadata (id,size,created,expires); all human-facing enrichment (from Alice / project / title) happens locally after decryption. This matches SPEC.md's inbox product view and the zero-knowledge relay contract.
